title: telosma angustiloba
intro: Telosma angustiloba, also known as the 'Yellow Coral Vine', is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Telosma angustiloba include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its uses and preparations can vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
